data.title: Palantir Plunges 5% After Hours As Alex Karp Plans $1.23 Billion Stock Sale, Cramer Urges 'Palanteers' For Support Amid Defense Cuts
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc. shares tumbled over 5% on Wednesday in after-hours trading following reports of potential Pentagon budget cuts and CEO Alex Karp's new stock trading plan rattled investors, marking a sharp reversal for one of the market's top performers.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Gain As Trump Reaffirms Crypto Support: Are Short Sellers Exiting The Market?
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies rose on Wednesday as President Donald Trump reiterated his intention to make the U.S. the "cryptocurrency capital."

data.title: Fire-Ravaged Properties In Pacific Palisades And Altadena Selling For 50% to 70% Less Than Their Peak Value
Top Analyst Predicts Apple Will Hit $4 Trillion First Followed By Nvidia — Says AI Demand Is 'Exploding' Despite Tariffs And DeepSeek Fears: 'The Bears Can't See AI In The Spreadsheets...'
data.description: Wedbush analyst Dan Ives predicts Apple will be the first company to reach a $4 trillion market cap, followed by Nvidia, emphasizing that AI demand is accelerating despite concerns over tariffs and DeepSeek competition.
